reviews.review_title: You will love this game but……
reviews.review_description: The game is vary good. Play with my kids and bots for now because here is the big but part of why only 4 star could be a 5 if more people played the multiplayer. But if you have friends and want to just have fun with guns this is it.
It deserves more players.. i really have a blast playing. It's Lazer tag and the gfx and physics are top notch.

The server is always empty and no people to at with :(
But an amazing game in general!
This game is unique and different from other games and can be fun but there is no players so there’s no one to play with and that’s why it makes no sense to buy it

The Federal Trade Commission announced today it is exploring a potential rule to combat deceptive or unfair review and endorsement practices, such as using fake reviews, suppressing negative reviews, and paying for positive reviews. Deceptive and manipulated reviews and endorsements cheat consumers looking for real feedback on a product or service and undercut honest businesses

developer_response.body:
Hi Mr. Kerr, 

thank you for the review. I am very sorry that you couldn't find a live game. Please jpin our active Discord channel to find games and people to form teams with. Maybe you will change your mind once you've played some games. And we can promise that we don't have any fake reviews. It also wouldn't make alot of sense for a free game, right ;)

reviews.review_title: My favorite VR game by far!
reviews.review_description:
Tower Tag is athletic, competitive, strategic, and out and out fun! The community is one of the best I have ever encountered, and I have made so many friends through it.
It also consistently gets my heart rate up and I look forward to playing so much that I can't wait for the next session or am super disappointed when I can't play.
Obsessed? Who, me?! ABSOLUTELY! 😁

I am editing to reply to Mr. Kerr.  It may be hard to believe that there are dedicated players of this game but we are here.  We all meet regularly and play for many hours each week.  But due to the small player base, we play at scheduled times.  It has been like that for years for some players.  And the reason someone would keep playing a game that requires (for the time being hopefully!) arranging game times?  Well that's simple.  It's because we really do love this game.  You are spinning conspiracy theories and making this out to be something that it simply isn't.  We are real players.
This game is really fun. Get it and help build a new community!  Finding other players requires waiting in the main menu and watching for a match to open up and that can take a while. Just practice with the bots and you will find some players eventually.  Once this game has a large user base it will be amazing!

update after 6 months of playing this almost everyday:
This game is actually super simple but it also requires a lot of skill to play at the highest levels.  It requires everything that a normal shooter does (fast reflexes, good aim, tactical awareness, etc..) but is is not cluttered with a bunch of extra stuff that takes away from the heart of the gameplay.  The replayability of this game is 100/100.  With a group of players who all have their own strengths, a 5 minute match becomes a fast paced game of laser tag in 3 different modes and something like 8 maps.  Over the last 6 months I have met a bunch of players who love this game as much as me and all over the world.  

This game to me attracts a more mature gaming crowd.  While there can be battle chaos in a full room with 4v4, there is still a refined aspect to the game that shuns the flashy in-game upgrades that other games have.  Which, like I said, allows the focus to remain on the pure skill that is required to win against the best.

It's also great exercise.  Playing this game actually got me in better shape lol

reviews.review_title: I got this game for free
reviews.review_description: I got this game for free, idk how but now it’s $15. I would get this game if you have other friends with big room scale areas. But make sure you also have a big room scale area too, otherwise this game isn’t playable. Idk if you need to require a room scale area, but if you don’t. I’ll highly recommend using a room scale for a better experience.

Installed this long ago bc it was free now it costs 15 lmao 💀💀



Also 💀💀💀💀

developer_response.body: Cool that you still got it for free still, if you are looking for teams, come join our discord :)

reviews.review_description: I love the game! I wish I had a little more health, or the towers were bigger but overall the game is excellent, especially for being free!
Absolutely deserves more attention!

This game is just pure fun.
Catching and jumping between the towers, team up, kill the opponents, multiple challenging arenas, what more can one wish from a game?

developer_response.body: Hi, I’m sorry you had a bad experience with the app. We are working on getting more players involved to make it the best experience possible. In the meantime, we hope that you can play some matches including bots to get ready for the real battle ahead. :)

reviews.review_title: Great idea and so much fun
reviews.review_description:
I was having a blast just playing with bots. AI is good enough to have fun. 
But playing with real people would obviously be better. 
More people need to try this. 
Highly recommend!

i am sure you guys will make improvements in the future but for now i think its the best VRvgame so far

developer_response.body:
Hi MR.gorillaVR0, 

we don't have any joystick movement. I think what you have experienced, is the room adjustment which you can use to fine adjust where the in-game platform/tower should be. :)

reviews.review_description: Amazing graphics and has huge potential hope you don't stop working on this!
The best game free! You need play it

It’s a really great game considering it’s free and in app lab. It has the potential to be very good.

I didn’t have many issues with the game, just a few. Firstly the movement system felt very unnatural and was quite annoying to use. Secondly, it doesn’t explain matchmaking very well in the tutorial and it can be hard to understand at first.

But overall, the shooting and the idea of the game was great and it is certainly something I’d recommend
